evals.prompt: I have a basic React + Tailwind dashboard with a navbar, some stat cards, and a data table. /giga-this-ui — transform the whole thing into the Gigaverse design system. The project is at ./test-projects/dashboard-app
evals.expected_output: All components restyled with Gigaverse tokens: navy background, gold/teal accents, bitcell/m5x7 fonts, giga card variants, themed navbar, animation variants created

evals.prompt: giga this ui — I want my landing page to look like it belongs in the Gigaverse. It's a simple hero + features + CTA layout built with React and Tailwind. Project at ./test-projects/landing-page
evals.expected_output: Landing page transformed: hero with bitcell heading, gold CTA button with gradient/shimmer, feature cards as giga standard cards, section dividers, scroll-triggered animations, responsive at all breakpoints

evals.prompt: make it giga — I have a settings page with forms, modals, and toggle switches. React + Tailwind project at ./test-projects/settings-page. Apply the gigaverse design system to all of it
evals.expected_output: Forms restyled with giga input pattern (transparent bg, border-2, bitcell font), modals use LandingModalShell pattern (overlay + panel + gradient header), toggles themed with giga colors, all text uses correct font hierarchy
